title: Aureline AI review-assist local-only finding-store and export-packet vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the local_review_findings_store_record, local_review_findings_export_packet_record, and local_review_findings_store_audit_event_record families frozen in docs/ai/review_resolution_memory_contract.md. Every AI review-assist finding kept on this client — whether the user dismissed it locally, kept it local because no provider write capability was held, exported it as a portable packet, or anchored it on the local review_workspace_record while waiting for a publish path to admit — resolves to exactly one local_review_findings_store_record carrying the bound finding ref, the analyzed scope ref, the resolution-memory ref, the diff-fingerprint binding (so a material-change watcher can invalidate the local copy when the bytes underneath the finding move), the provider/model identity refs (so the local copy remains accountable to the provider entry, model entry, and external-tool entry the run was bound to), the policy/trust context refs (so the local copy remains accountable to the policy epoch and workspace-trust state at the moment of mint), the publish-eligibility class on this client (so the local copy never claims publish capability the client does not actually hold), the storage-authority class (always user_owned_recovery_state for local review findings; admin policy MAY narrow to admin_or_control_artifact for org-policy-suppressed cases), the delete-posture class (delete_clears_local_only / delete_clears_local_and_managed / delete_blocks_on_hold / delete_request_supported_with_destruction_receipt), the export-posture class (exportable_as_user_visible / exportable_metadata_only / exportable_as_evidence_packet / not_exportable_local_authority_only / not_exportable_secret_adjacent), and the retention-posture class (workspace_scoped / user_pin_only / case_close_or_archive / never_gc_authoritative). The export-packet record projects the local store row into a portable packet that preserves analyzed scope, diff fingerprint, provider/model identity, policy/trust context, and publish eligibility WITHOUT pretending publication succeeded; an export packet whose source store row carries publish_blocked_provider_write_missing_keep_local_or_export MUST carry export_publish_state_class = export_records_publish_was_not_performed and MUST NOT carry the export_records_publish_was_performed value, and the schema enforces that pairing through an allOf gate. The schema composes with (and does not replace) schemas/ai/review_finding.schema.json (the bound finding row), schemas/ai/review_scope_selection.schema.json (the analyzed scope row), schemas/ai/review_resolution_memory.schema.json (the bound resolution row), schemas/ai/publish_to_review_sheet.schema.json (the publish path the local row's eligibility cites), schemas/ai/provider_registry.schema.json (the bound provider entry), schemas/ai/model_registry.schema.json (the bound model entry), schemas/ai/external_tool_registry.schema.json (the bound external-tool entries), schemas/ai/memory_object.schema.json (the storage-authority / delete-posture / export-posture / retention-posture vocabulary mirrored verbatim), schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json (freshness_class / client_scope / redaction_class), and schemas/governance/delete_request_state.schema.json (the delete-request lifecycle the local store admits). Raw outbound text bodies, raw inline-suggestion patch bodies, raw check-annotation payloads, raw provider URLs, raw provider-thread URLs, raw author identity strings, raw notebook cell text, raw diff bodies, raw terminal bytes, raw prompt text, raw URLs, raw absolute paths, raw branch / commit URLs, raw API keys, raw OAuth tokens, raw mTLS material, raw model weights, raw embeddings, and raw provider payloads MUST NOT appear on any record emitted against this schema; every preview is a redaction-aware reviewable label or an opaque ref. The eventual review-assist crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new record kind, storage-authority class, delete-posture class, export-posture class, retention-posture class, publish-eligibility class, export-publish-state class, export-disclosure class, denial reason, or audit-event id is additive-minor and bumps local_review_findings_store_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

local_review_findings_store_schema_versi.description: Integer schema version for the local-review-findings-store vocabulary. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles / evidence packets / claim manifests / admin-reconciliation consoles. Raw outbound text bodies, raw inline-suggestion patch bodies, raw check-annotation payloads, raw provider URLs, raw provider-thread URLs, raw author identity strings, raw notebook cell text, raw diff bodies, raw terminal bytes, raw prompt text, raw URLs, raw absolute paths, raw branch / commit URLs, raw API keys, raw OAuth tokens, raw mTLS material, raw model weights, raw embeddings, and raw provider payloads never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_label.description: Redaction-aware reviewable label (<= 1024 graphemes). Carries a presentation-only summary safe for store inspectors, export readouts, support bundles, and audit exports. Never carries the raw payload byte stream beyond what the broker-owned redaction pass (ADR-0007) admits.

redaction_class.description: Re-exported verbatim from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json (ADR-0011). Local-store rows touching credentialed flows MUST raise to operator_only_restricted.

policy_context.description: Policy context the local-store row was minted under. The bound finding's policy_context MUST match these refs at the moment of mint.

storage_authority_class.description: Storage-authority vocabulary for the local review-findings store. Mirrored from schemas/ai/memory_object.schema.json storage_authority_class but narrowed to the two authority classes the local store may carry. user_owned_recovery_state is the default for local review findings (delete is local-only by default). admin_or_control_artifact is admissible only when the row is org-policy-suppressed (suppressed_by_policy in the bound resolution row) so admin policy can hold the row through an admin policy bundle.

delete_posture_class.description: Frozen delete-posture vocabulary, mirrored verbatim from schemas/ai/memory_object.schema.json delete_posture_class. delete_clears_local_only is the default for local review findings; delete_blocks_on_hold fires when the row is bound to a legal / support / retention-minimum hold; delete_request_supported_with_destruction_receipt fires when the row is on a managed copy that requires a destruction receipt; delete_denied_class_immutable fires for org-policy-suppressed rows whose admin policy bundle refuses generic delete; delete_denied_evidence_packet_overrides fires when the row is bound to a retained evidence packet and the packet's delete posture wins.

export_posture_class.description: Frozen export-posture vocabulary. Mirrored from schemas/ai/memory_object.schema.json export_posture_class but narrowed (the not_exportable_regeneratable_only value does not apply to review findings; review findings are not regeneratable in the same sense as derived caches).

retention_posture_class.description: Frozen retention-posture vocabulary for local review findings. Mirrored from schemas/ai/memory_object.schema.json retention_posture_class but narrowed to the four classes the local review-findings store may carry.

publish_eligibility_class.description: Frozen publish-eligibility vocabulary, mirrored verbatim from schemas/ai/review_resolution_memory.schema.json publish_eligibility_class so the local store row never disagrees with the bound resolution row about whether publish is admitted.

export_publish_state_class.description: Frozen export-publish-state vocabulary on the export packet. The packet records what actually happened on this client; it never paints publish as having succeeded when it did not. export_records_publish_was_performed is admissible only when the bound publish-to-review sheet recorded publish_to_destination AND the resolution-memory row carries published_to_review_destination. The remaining values name the typed local-only / blocked outcomes the export packet preserves.

export_disclosure_class.description: Frozen export-disclosure vocabulary on the export packet. Names what the packet discloses about the bound finding / scope / provider / publish-state and what the user must review before the packet leaves this client. redaction_required_user_must_review_before_export and export_blocked_secret_adjacent_user_must_review are refusal-shaped values; the packet MUST NOT cross the boundary while either is set.

delete_request_lifecycle_class.description: Frozen delete-request-lifecycle vocabulary on the local store row. Mirrors schemas/governance/delete_request_state.schema.json transitions but narrowed to the lifecycle a review-finding store row can carry.

local_review_findings_store_denial_reaso.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary on the local-review-findings-store audit stream. Denials fail closed; silent downgrade to a freshly-painted local row, an undisclosed export packet, or a publish_records_publish_was_performed claim under publish_blocked_* eligibility is forbidden.

local_review_findings_store_audit_event_.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the local-review-findings-store stream. local_review_findings_store_audit_denial_emitted MUST cite a local_review_findings_store_denial_reason.

diff_fingerprint_kind.description: Frozen diff-fingerprint-kind vocabulary, mirrored verbatim from schemas/ai/review_resolution_memory.schema.json diff_fingerprint_kind.

provider_entry_ref.description: Opaque ref to the schemas/ai/provider_registry.schema.json provider_entry_record the run was bound to.

model_entry_ref.description: Opaque ref to the schemas/ai/model_registry.schema.json model_entry_record the run was bound to.

external_tool_entry_refs.description: Opaque refs to the schemas/ai/external_tool_registry.schema.json external_tool_entry_record entries the run cited. Empty when the run cited no external tools.

execution_locus_class.description: Mirrors the schemas/ai/provider_registry.schema.json execution-locus vocabulary so the local-store row records where the run executed without re-mining the provider routing.

provider_model_identity.description: Provider / model identity binding the local-store row records so the row remains accountable to the provider entry, model entry, and external-tool entries the run was bound to.

review_finding_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the schemas/ai/review_finding.schema.json review_finding_record this local row binds. Required (non-null); a missing ref denies with review_finding_id_ref_required.

review_resolution_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the schemas/ai/review_resolution_memory.schema.json review_resolution_record the local row records resolution memory through. Required (non-null).

analyzed_scope_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the schemas/ai/review_scope_selection.schema.json review_scope_selection_record the bound finding was minted under. Required (non-null).

review_workspace_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the schemas/vcs/review_workspace.schema.json review_workspace_record the local row belongs to.

publish_to_review_sheet_id_ref.description: Required (non-null) when publish_eligibility_class is one of the publish_eligible_* values OR when publish_eligibility_class is one of the publish_blocked_* values that require a publish-sheet refusal record. Null when publish_eligibility_class is not_applicable_local_only_no_publish_proposed.

diff_fingerprints.description: Ordered set of fingerprint blocks. minItems = 1 enforces diff_fingerprint_required_at_least_one mechanically so the local row never claims freshness without a binding to the bytes the finding was minted against.

hosted_review_inbox_record_id_ref.description: Forward-dependency slot reserved for the hosted-review inbox contract. Currently always null.

allOf.description: publish_eligibility_class in the publish_eligible_* set MUST cite a non-null publish_to_review_sheet_id_ref.
delete_posture_class = delete_blocks_on_hold MUST pair with delete_request_lifecycle_class = delete_blocked_on_hold_pending_release.
storage_authority_class = admin_or_control_artifact MUST pair with delete_posture_class in {delete_denied_class_immutable, delete_blocks_on_hold, delete_request_supported_with_destruction_receipt}.
archived_at is required (non-null) when retention_posture_class = case_close_or_archive AND the row has been archived.

local_review_findings_store_record.description: Local-only finding store row consumed by the AI review-assist resolution panel, the export-packet assembler, the delete-request reconciler, and audit / support / export. Exactly one row per finding identity on this client; rerun produces a successor row, never a mutation in place.

allOf.description: publish_eligibility_class in the publish_blocked_* set MUST NOT carry export_publish_state_class = export_records_publish_was_performed.
publish_eligibility_class in the publish_eligible_* set AND export_publish_state_class = export_records_publish_was_performed MUST cite a non-null publish_to_review_sheet_id_ref.

export_disclosure_class in {redaction_required_user_must_review_before_export, export_blocked_secret_adjacent_user_must_review} MUST refuse export; the packet MUST NOT cross the boundary while either is set. The packet may still be assembled for user review, but the audit stream records local_review_findings_export_packet_blocked_redaction_required or local_review_findings_export_packet_blocked_secret_adjacent rather than local_review_findings_export_packet_assembled.

local_review_findings_export_packet_reco.description: Export-packet row projecting a local_review_findings_store_record into a portable packet that preserves analyzed scope, diff fingerprint, provider/model identity, policy/trust context, and publish eligibility WITHOUT pretending publication succeeded. Exactly one packet per (store row, assembly time).

local_review_findings_store_audit_event_.description: Audit-event row on the local-review-findings-store stream.
